ranked_candidates.reason: Top Strength: Proven track record in building production ML systems and leading teams. Main Gap: Limited experience with Spark or distributed computing, but has certifications in AWS and Google Professional ML Engineer.

Top Strength: MLOps expertise and hands-on experience with ML infrastructure. Main Gap: No direct leadership or mentoring experience, but has implemented governance framework.
